[2026-02-20 15:08:34] ACTION ITEMID BARCODE PRICE X WEIGHT/QTY = FINALPRICE
[2026-02-20 15:08:48] INSERT 000717990 1829887 1829887 : 267500  x 1  = 267500
[2026-02-20 15:08:49] INSERT 000717991 2030097003880 0038901 : 67000  x 0.388  = 25996
[2026-02-20 15:08:51] INSERT 000717992 8992933771114 0085329 : 15750  x 1  = 15750
